hypothesis: Incorporating DFT-derived band gap values computed via the ∆-Sol method directly into an EMD-based metric (band gap EMD) will exhibit stronger correlation with SUN stability scores than formation energy EMD computed from machine learning regressors, because DFT-grounded electronic structure properties capture chemically meaningful constraints that ML-predicted energies systematically misrepresent for out-of-distribution generated structures, and this correlation will be measurable and statistically significant across both the MP and OQMD datasets using the perturbative benchmark introduced in this framework.
